'''"Wrong-Way" Wint''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Clantaani]] who belonged to a gang of criminals in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] led by [[Longo Two-Guns]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] placed a bounty on Wint for skimming profits from a "legitimate" protection agency on [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]]. He was captured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the bounty just after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
